conjectures.name: Riemann Hypothesis
conjectures.statement: All non-trivial zeros of the Riemann zeta function \(\zeta(s)\) have real part equal to \(\frac{1}{2}\), i.e., if \(\zeta(s) = 0\) and \(0 < \text{Re}(s) < 1\), then \(\text{Re}(s) = \frac{1}{2}\).

conjectures.name: Twin Prime Conjecture
conjectures.statement: There exist infinitely many primes p such that p + 2 is also prime, i.e., \( \#\{p \text{ prime} : p+2 \text{ prime}\} = \infty \).

conjectures.name: Hardy–Littlewood Prime k-tuples Conjecture
conjectures.statement: For an admissible k-tuple \(\{h_1, h_2, ..., h_k\}\), the number of integers n ≤ x such that n+h_1, ..., n+h_k are all prime is asymptotically \( \sim \mathfrak{S}(h_1,...,h_k) \int_2^x \frac{dt}{(\log t)^k} \), where \(\mathfrak{S}\) is the singular series.

conjectures.name: Elliott–Halberstam Conjecture
conjectures.statement: For any \( \theta < 1 \), \( \sum_{q \le x^\theta} \max_{(a,q)=1} | \pi(x; q,a) - \frac{\text{li}(x)}{\phi(q)} | \ll x / (\log x)^A \) for all A > 0.

conjectures.name: Generalized Elliott–Halberstam Conjecture
conjectures.statement: Let \(\Lambda(n)\) be the von Mangoldt function. For any \(\theta < 1\), \( \sum_{q \le x^\theta} \max_{(a,q)=1} | \sum_{n \le x, n \equiv a \pmod q} \Lambda(n) - x/\phi(q) | \ll x / (\log x)^A \) for all A > 0.

conjectures.name: Bateman–Horn Conjecture
conjectures.statement: For polynomials \(f_1,...,f_k \in \mathbb{Z}[x]\) with positive leading coefficients, the number of n ≤ x with all f_i(n) prime is asymptotically \( \sim \frac{C}{\prod_{i=1}^k \deg f_i} \int_2^x \frac{dt}{(\log t)^k} \), where C is the product over primes of local densities.

conjectures.name: Dickson's Conjecture
conjectures.statement: If \(\{a_i n + b_i\}_{i=1}^k\) is an admissible set of linear forms, then there exist infinitely many n such that all \(a_i n + b_i\) are prime.

conjectures.name: Polignac's Conjecture
conjectures.statement: For every even number 2k, there exist infinitely many consecutive primes p_n, p_{n+1} such that p_{n+1} - p_n = 2k.

conjectures.name: Firoozbakht's Conjecture
conjectures.statement: The sequence \( p_n^{1/n} \) is strictly decreasing, where \( p_n \) denotes the \( n \)-th prime. Equivalently, \( p_{n+1} < p_n^{1 + 1/n} \) for all \( n \geq 1 \), which implies \( p_{n+1} - p_n < (\log p_n)^2 - \log p_n \) for \( n > 9 \).

conjectures.name: Granville's Refinement of Cramér's Conjecture
conjectures.statement: There exist infinitely many n such that \( p_{n+1} - p_n \ge (2e^{-\gamma} + o(1)) \log^2 p_n \), where \(\gamma\) is Euler–Mascheroni constant.

related_results.name: Bombieri–Vinogradov Theorem
related_results.statement: For Q ≤ x^{1/2 - ε}, \( \sum_{q \le Q} \max_{(a,q)=1} |\pi(x;q,a) - \pi(x)/\phi(q)| \ll x / (\log x)^A \) for any A>0.

related_results.name: Zhang–Maynard–Tao Bounded Gap Theorem
related_results.statement: There exists a constant H such that infinitely many pairs of primes p, p' satisfy 0 < |p - p'| ≤ H.
